creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Wed May 21 05:26:27 2014
New Revision: 354703
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354703
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354703/

Log:
  - Update to 3.7
  
  PR:		189235
  Submitted by:	Maintainer

Modified:
  head/lang/munger/Makefile
  head/lang/munger/distinfo

Modified: head/lang/munger/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/munger/Makefile	Wed May 21 05:25:52 2014	(r354702)
+++ head/lang/munger/Makefile	Wed May 21 05:26:27 2014	(r354703)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	5.4
+PORTVERSION=	5.6
 CATEGORIES=	lang
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/
 
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ COMMENT=	Static lisp interpreter with te
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	libtre.so:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libtre
 
+DESTDIRNAME=	STAGEDIR
 DATADIR=	${PREFIX}/share/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	SQLITE
@@ -19,7 +20,4 @@ OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	SQLITE
 SQLITE_USE=	SQLITE=3
 SQLITE_MAKE_ARGS=	-DWITH_SQL
 
-post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} 's,MUNGERPATH|$${DEST},/MUNGERPATH|$${PREFIX}/bin,' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/lang/munger/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/munger/distinfo	Wed May 21 05:25:52 2014	(r354702)
+++ head/lang/munger/distinfo	Wed May 21 05:26:27 2014	(r354703)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (munger-5.4.tar.gz) = e3b211890ca646495534fa73234d86cc0aa6d6d0a50a2668b2c082ef530b2f82
-SIZE (munger-5.4.tar.gz) = 213505
+SHA256 (munger-5.6.tar.gz) = 137db752274057c9d21e7de1de318bb0c75c46517e17f4f1bf63ecbe915a21e8
+SIZE (munger-5.6.tar.gz) = 213537
